history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A triptych of close-up, slightly grainy selfies of a young East Asian man with dark hair and brown eyes. The man is wearing a black t-shirt. In the top panel, his head is tilted slightly, and his right hand is brought up to his mouth, with his fingers touching his lips. His gaze is directed slightly off-camera to the left. The middle panel shows a similar pose, but his mouth is slightly open, and his lips appear glossy. He is looking directly at the camera. The bottom panel shows him looking to the right, with his head slightly bowed, and his fingers again near his mouth. The lighting is soft and appears to be from an overhead source, casting subtle shadows on his face. The background in all three panels is blurred and consists of dark tones, with hints of office-like furniture or equipment, suggesting an indoor setting. The overall mood is introspective and somewhat pensive. The color palette is dominated by muted skin tones, dark clothing, and subdued background colors. The style is candid and personal, reminiscent of social media self-portraits.
